mapper.select: SELECT * FROM investment_event WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT ev.*, inv.name as investor_name, ent.name as enterprise_name FROM investment_event ev JOIN investor inv ON ev.investor_id = inv.id JOIN enterprise ent ON ev.enterprise_id = ent.id WHERE ev.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY ev.time DESC
SELECT * FROM investment_event WHERE investor_id = #{investorId} ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT * FROM investment_event ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT * FROM investment_event WHERE time >= #{startTime} AND time <= #{endTime} ORDER BY time

SELECT i.name as industry, SUBSTRING(e.time, 1, 4) as year, COUNT(*) as count FROM investment_event e JOIN enterprise ent ON e.enterprise_id = ent.id JOIN industry i ON ent.industry_id = i.id GROUP BY i.name, SUBSTRING(e.time, 1, 4) ORDER BY i.name, year
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO investment_event(investor_id, enterprise_id, round, amount, time, lead_flag, relation, source) VALUES(#{investorId}, #{enterpriseId}, #{round}, #{amount}, #{time}, #{leadFlag}, #{relation}, #{source})

INSERT INTO investment_event(investor_id, enterprise_id, round, amount, time, lead_flag, relation, source) VALUES
(#{e.investorId}, #{e.enterpriseId}, #{e.round}, #{e.amount}, #{e.time}, #{e.leadFlag}, #{e.relation}, #{e.source})
